name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES
  state,
  turn

vars == <<state, turn>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

Init ==
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
     /\ state[i] = "idle"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
     /\ state[i] = "trying"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
     /\ turn' = i
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
     /\ state[i] = "critical"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

Safety == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => state[i] /= "critical" /\ state[j] /= "critical"

SpecWithSafety == Spec /\ Safety

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS
  Coordinator,
  Participants

VARIABLES
  state,
  votes,
  decision

Message ==
  [ sender : Coordinator \cup Participants,
    receiver : Coordinator \cup Participants,
    type : {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
    content : [ "transaction" |-> "T1" ] ]

State ==
  [ coordinator : {"Idle", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted"},
    participants : [ p \in Participants |-> {"Idle", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"} ] ]

Init ==
  /\ state = [ coordinator |-> "Idle",
               participants |-> [ p \in Participants |-> "Idle" ] ]
  /\ votes = {}
  /\ decision = {}

Prepare ==
  /\ state.coordinator = "Idle"
  /\ state' = [ state EXCEPT !.coordinator = "Waiting" ]
  /\ UNCHANGED << votes, decision >>

VoteYes(p) ==
  /\ state.coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ state.participants[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ votes' = votes \cup { [ sender |-> p, type |-> "VoteYes" ] }
  /\ state' = [ state EXCEPT !.participants[p] = "Committed" ]
  /\ UNCHANGED decision

VoteNo(p) ==
  /\ state.coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ state.participants[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ votes' = votes \cup { [ sender |-> p, type |-> "VoteNo" ] }
  /\ state' = [ state EXCEPT !.participants[p] = "Aborted" ]
  /\ UNCHANGED decision

Commit ==
  /\ state.coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ decision = {}
  /\ votes = { m \in Message : m.type = "VoteYes" }
  /\ decision' = [ "decision" |-> "Commit" ]
  /\ state' = [ state EXCEPT !.coordinator = "Committed" ]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

Abort ==
  /\ state.coordinator = "Waiting"
  /\ decision = {}
  /\ votes \neq { m \in Message : m.type = "VoteYes" }
  /\ decision' = [ "decision" |-> "Abort" ]
  /\ state' = [ state EXCEPT !.coordinator = "Aborted" ]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ \E p \in Participants : VoteYes(p)
  \/ \E p \in Participants : VoteNo(p)
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<< state, votes, decision >>

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in State
  /\ votes \subset

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES forks, state

TypeOK == forks \in 1..N -> {0,1} /\ state \in 1..N -> {"thinking","hungry","eating"}

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1

Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

Eat(i) == /\ state[i] = "hungry"
/\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
/\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

Think(i) == /\ state[i] = "eating"
/\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
/\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "thinking" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N: (Eat(i) \/ Think(i) \/ Hungry(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks,state>> /\ WF_vars(Next)

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
/\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
/\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
/\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
/\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + MAX({num[j] : j \in 1..N /\ flag[j] /\ j /= i})]
/\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES
  queue,
  producer,
  consumer

vars == <<queue, producer, consumer>>

Init == /\ queue = << >>
   /\ producer = 0
   /\ consumer = 0

Producer == /\ producer < K
   /\ queue' = Append(queue, producer)
   /\ producer' = producer + 1
   /\ consumer' = consumer

Consumer == /\ consumer < Len(queue)
   /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
   /\ consumer' = consumer + 1
   /\ producer' = producer

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ queue \in Seq(0..K-1)
   /\ producer \in 0..K
   /\ consumer \in 0..K

====
